name: lsm-sdk
description: Label-SQL Mapping SDK for database query and AI integration

scripts.update-readme-version: node -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const fs = require('fs'); let readme = fs.readFileSync('README.md', 'utf8'); readme = readme.replace(/badge\/version-v[\d.]+-blue/, 'badge/version-v' + pkg.version + '-blue'); readme = readme.replace(/releases\/tag\/v[\d.]+/, 'releases/tag/v' + pkg.version); fs.writeFileSync('README.md', readme, 'utf8'); console.log('README.md version updated to v' + pkg.version);"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run update-readme-version && npm run build
